knowledge_atoms.text: At 6 o'clock in the morning. I work at night.
Class, clock, plate, eggplant, clean, play.
Describing a weekly schedule of activities.

Give answers about yourself.
What do you do on the weekend?
Good girl! So what do you do on the weekend?
I always start class at 8 o'clock.
I often clean my room and wash my clothes. Sometimes I play ping-pong with Zhang Peng.
I often clean my room on Saturdays!
I often get up at 7 o'clock.
I often go shopping with my mum.
I often watch TV and play ping-pong with my father.
Learn common collocations with verbs 'go', 'play', 'have', and 'do'.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 学习与动词 'go', 'play', 'have', 和 'do' 的常见搭配。

knowledge_atoms.text: Learn the consonant blend 'cl' as in 'clean'.
Learn the consonant blend 'pl' as in 'plate'.
Look, tick and write. What do you do on the weekend?
My mum worked last night. So I'm shopping today.
Practice asking and answering about daily routines for different professions.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 练习询问和回答不同职业的日常作息。

knowledge_atoms.text: Practice asking and answering questions about daily routines.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 练习问答关于日常作息的问题。

knowledge_atoms.text: Read and understand a text about daily routines.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 阅读并理解一篇关于日常作息的文章。

knowledge_atoms.text: That sounds like a lot of fun.
Today is Sunday! What do you do on the weekend?
We finish class at 1 o'clock. Then we eat lunch at home.
What do you do on the weekend?
What do you usually do on the weekend?
When do you do morning exercises?
When do you finish class in the morning?
When do you go to bed?
When do you start class in Spain?
When do you usually eat dinner in Spain?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 你在西班牙通常什么时候吃晚饭？

knowledge_atoms.text: Where are Zhang Peng and Pedro? Listen and tick.
Where is Sarah? Listen and circle.
Wow! When do you go back to school after lunch?
Write a letter to Robinson. Tell him what you often do every day.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: My day. 单元首页图。张鹏和一个来自西班牙的朋友在路上边走边聊。他们互相询问对方的作息时间，比如起床时间和上课时间，引出本单元关于日常活动和时间的主题。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word get up?
Can you say: When do you get up?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: My day. 页面展示了两个对话场景。场景一在室内，艾米和莎拉讨论她们周末的活动。场景二在室外，小熊祖姆和小松鼠兹普也在讨论周末的活动。两个场景都围绕询问和回答周末做什么展开。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word on the weekend?
Can you say: What do you do on the weekend?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Daily schedules. 张鹏和来自西班牙的佩德罗讨论他们各自的学校作息时间，包括上午下课、午饭、下午上课以及晚餐的时间。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word finish class?
Can you say: When do you finish class in the morning?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Daily Activities. 通过一个带有时间轴的圆形图示，展示了一天中的五个主要活动，学习相关的动词短语。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word do morning exercises?
Can you say: When do you do morning exercises?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Phonics: cl / pl. 一个Bingo游戏。老师读出一系列单词，学生在自己的九宫格中找到并圈出听到的单词，如果圈出的单词连成一条线，就喊“Bingo!”。
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Class, clock, plate, eggplant, clean, play.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Weekend Activities. 莎拉在菜市场购物时与店主交谈。她解释了今天购物的原因，并与店主讨论了她周末通常会做的各种活动，如看电视、打乒乓球、洗衣服和做饭。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word shopping?
Can you say: What do you do on the weekend?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Weekend Activities. 通过图片展示了四种周末活动，学习相关的动词短语。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word clean my room?
Can you say: I often clean my room on Saturdays!

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Reading and writing about daily life. 机器人罗宾正在扮演鲁滨逊·克鲁索，并以鲁滨逊的口吻写了一封信，描述了他在岛上的日常生活，包括起床、洗漱、吃饭、打扫山洞以及和朋友“星期五”一起运动。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word island?
Can you say: Read and understand a text about daily routines.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Unit 1 Check & Wrap-up. 听录音，根据听到的内容，勾选出Mike在周末会做的三项活动。
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and tick.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Story time. 一个连环画故事。小松鼠zip向小熊zoom讲述了自己一周的忙碌日程，包括周一到周三收集坚果，周四晒坚果，周五和朋友分享坚果。当zoom问起周末的安排时，zip才突然想起自己周六12点有一场琵琶表演，而现在已经快到时间了。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word busy?
Can you say: Describing a weekly schedule of activities.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 单元首页图。张鹏和一个来自西班牙的朋友在路上边走边聊。他们互相询问对方的作息时间，比如起床时间和上课时间，引出本单元关于日常活动和时间的主题。 Key patterns: When do you get up?; When do you start class?
core_patterns: When do you get up?
When do you start class?
When do you start class in Spain?
I often get up at 7 o'clock.
Usually at 9 o'clock.
I always start class at 8 o'clock.
allowed_answer_scope: I often get up at 7 o'clock.
I always start class at 8 o'clock.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word get up?
Can you say: When do you get up?
return_anchors: When do you get up?
When do you start class?
When do you start class in Spain?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 页面展示了两个对话场景。场景一在室内，艾米和莎拉讨论她们周末的活动。场景二在室外，小熊祖姆和小松鼠兹普也在讨论周末的活动。两个场景都围绕询问和回答周末做什么展开。 Key patterns: What do you do on the weekend?; Today is Sunday! What do you do on the weekend?
core_patterns: What do you do on the weekend?
Today is Sunday! What do you do on the weekend?
I often clean my room and wash my clothes. Sometimes I play ping-pong with Zhang Peng.
I often go shopping with my mum.
allowed_answer_scope: I often clean my room and wash my clothes. Sometimes I play ping-pong with Zhang Peng.
I often go shopping with my mum.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word on the weekend?
Can you say: What do you do on the weekend?
return_anchors: What do you do on the weekend?
Today is Sunday! What do you do on the weekend?
I often clean my room and wash my clothes. Sometimes I play ping-pong with Zhang Peng.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听录音，根据对话内容判断张鹏和佩德罗（Pedro）在哪里，并勾选正确的地点图片。 Key patterns: Where are Zhang Peng and Pedro? Listen and tick.
core_patterns: Where are Zhang Peng and Pedro? Listen and tick.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Where are Zhang Peng and Pedro? Listen and tick.
return_anchors: Where are Zhang Peng and Pedro? Listen and tick.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 张鹏和来自西班牙的佩德罗讨论他们各自的学校作息时间，包括上午下课、午饭、下午上课以及晚餐的时间。 Key patterns: When do you finish class in the morning?; When do you usually eat dinner in Spain?
core_patterns: When do you finish class in the morning?
When do you usually eat dinner in Spain?
Wow! When do you go back to school after lunch?
We finish class at 1 o'clock. Then we eat lunch at home.
At 2:30. Classes start at 3 o'clock.
Usually at 9:30 or 10 o'clock.
allowed_answer_scope: We finish class at 1 o'clock. Then we eat lunch at home.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word finish class?
Can you say: When do you finish class in the morning?
return_anchors: When do you finish class in the morning?
When do you usually eat dinner in Spain?
Wow! When do you go back to school after lunch?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 角色扮演活动。学生扮演不同职业的人（如出租车司机、厨师、运动员、护士），互相询问作息时间，如起床和睡觉时间。 Key patterns: Practice asking and answering about daily routines for different professions.; When do you get up?
core_patterns: Practice asking and answering about daily routines for different professions.
When do you get up?
When do you go to bed?
I get up at 5 o'clock.
At 6 o'clock in the morning. I work at night.
allowed_answer_scope: At 6 o'clock in the morning. I work at night.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Practice asking and answering about daily routines for different professions.
return_anchors: Practice asking and answering about daily routines for different professions.
When do you get up?
When do you go to bed?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 通过一个带有时间轴的圆形图示，展示了一天中的五个主要活动，学习相关的动词短语。 Key patterns: When do you do morning exercises?; At 7 o'clock.
core_patterns: When do you do morning exercises?
At 7 o'clock.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word do morning exercises?
Can you say: When do you do morning exercises?
return_anchors: When do you do morning exercises?
At 7 o'clock.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice write activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个伙伴活动。学生需要互相询问对方的日常活动时间表，并填写在相应的横线上。这是一个个性化的书面练习。 Key patterns: Practice asking and answering questions about daily routines.; When do you get up?
core_patterns: Practice asking and answering questions about daily routines.
When do you get up?
I get up at 6:00 a.m.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Practice asking and answering questions about daily routines.
return_anchors: Practice asking and answering questions about daily routines.
When do you get up?
I get up at 6:00 a.m.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Notice and repeat the target pronunciation pattern.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 学习辅音丛'cl'和'pl'在单词开头的发音。 Key patterns: Learn the consonant blend 'cl' as in 'clean'.; Learn the consonant blend 'pl' as in 'plate'.
core_patterns: Learn the consonant blend 'cl' as in 'clean'.
Learn the consonant blend 'pl' as in 'plate'.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word clean?
Can you say: Learn the consonant blend 'cl' as in 'clean'.
return_anchors: Learn the consonant blend 'cl' as in 'clean'.
Learn the consonant blend 'pl' as in 'plate'.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Transfer the page language into a new speaking task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个Bingo游戏。老师读出一系列单词，学生在自己的九宫格中找到并圈出听到的单词，如果圈出的单词连成一条线，就喊“Bingo!”。 Key patterns: Class, clock, plate, eggplant, clean, play.; Bingo!
core_patterns: Class, clock, plate, eggplant, clean, play.
Bingo!
allowed_answer_scope: Class, clock, plate, eggplant, clean, play.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Class, clock, plate, eggplant, clean, play.
return_anchors: Class, clock, plate, eggplant, clean, play.
Bingo!

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice choice activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 从给定的选项中选择最合适的单词填空，完成句子。 Key patterns: Choose, write and say.
core_patterns: Choose, write and say.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Choose, write and say.
return_anchors: Choose, write and say.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听录音，根据对话内容判断莎拉在哪里，并圈出正确的地点图片。 Key patterns: Where is Sarah? Listen and circle.
core_patterns: Where is Sarah? Listen and circle.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Where is Sarah? Listen and circle.
return_anchors: Where is Sarah? Listen and circle.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 莎拉在菜市场购物时与店主交谈。她解释了今天购物的原因，并与店主讨论了她周末通常会做的各种活动，如看电视、打乒乓球、洗衣服和做饭。 Key patterns: What do you do on the weekend?; Why are you shopping today?
core_patterns: What do you do on the weekend?
Why are you shopping today?
Good girl! So what do you do on the weekend?
My mum worked last night. So I'm shopping today.
I often watch TV and play ping-pong with my father.
That sounds like a lot of fun.
allowed_answer_scope: My mum worked last night. So I'm shopping today.
I often watch TV and play ping-pong with my father.
That sounds like a lot of fun.
Yes, but I'm also hard-working. I usually wash my clothes. Sometimes I cook dinner.
You're so busy! You need a robot to help you!
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word shopping?
Can you say: What do you do on the weekend?
return_anchors: What do you do on the weekend?
Why are you shopping today?
Good girl! So what do you do on the weekend?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个连锁提问活动。一个学生问“你周末做什么？”，另一个学生回答后，再把同样的问题传给下一个同学。活动提供了一个词汇库作为回答参考。 Key patterns: What do you do on the weekend?; I often go shopping.
core_patterns: What do you do on the weekend?
I often go shopping.
I usually clean my room.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word do homework?
Can you say: What do you do on the weekend?
branchable_topics: Ask the question and then pass it on.
return_anchors: What do you do on the weekend?
I often go shopping.
I usually clean my room.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 通过图片展示了四种周末活动，学习相关的动词短语。 Key patterns: I often clean my room on Saturdays!
core_patterns: I often clean my room on Saturdays!
allowed_answer_scope: I often clean my room on Saturdays!
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word clean my room?
Can you say: I often clean my room on Saturdays!
return_anchors: I often clean my room on Saturdays!

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice write activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个关于周末活动的个人调查。学生需要根据自己的实际情况，在表格中勾选并填写自己周末活动的频率、内容、同伴和时间，然后写出一个完整的句子。 Key patterns: Look, tick and write. What do you do on the weekend?
core_patterns: Look, tick and write. What do you do on the weekend?
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word always?
Can you say: Look, tick and write. What do you do on the weekend?
return_anchors: Look, tick and write. What do you do on the weekend?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and understand the key information in the passage.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 机器人罗宾正在扮演鲁滨逊·克鲁索，并以鲁滨逊的口吻写了一封信，描述了他在岛上的日常生活，包括起床、洗漱、吃饭、打扫山洞以及和朋友“星期五”一起运动。 Key patterns: Read and understand a text about daily routines.
core_patterns: Read and understand a text about daily routines.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word island?
Can you say: Read and understand a text about daily routines.
branchable_topics: Reading and writing about daily life
return_anchors: Read and understand a text about daily routines.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice true false activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 根据鲁滨逊的信件内容，判断三个陈述句的对错。 Key patterns: Tick or cross.
core_patterns: Tick or cross.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Tick or cross.
branchable_topics: Reading and writing about daily life
return_anchors: Tick or cross.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the writing prompt activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一项写作任务，要求学生给鲁滨逊写一封回信，告诉他自己每天经常做的事情。 Key patterns: Write a letter to Robinson. Tell him what you often do every day.
core_patterns: Write a letter to Robinson. Tell him what you often do every day.
allowed_answer_scope: Write a letter to Robinson. Tell him what you often do every day.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Write a letter to Robinson. Tell him what you often do every day.
branchable_topics: Reading and writing about daily life
return_anchors: Write a letter to Robinson. Tell him what you often do every day.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听录音，根据听到的内容，勾选出Mike在周末会做的三项活动。 Key patterns: Listen and tick.
core_patterns: Listen and tick.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and tick.
return_anchors: Listen and tick.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice write activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary:
一个个性化的写作练习。学生需要根据自己的实际情况，回答关于周末活动的问题，并使用不同的频度副词。 Key patterns: Give answers about yourself.
What do you do on the weekend?
core_patterns:

teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 总结和巩固动词搭配。学生需要从词库中选择合适的词语，与动词'go', 'play', 'have', 'do'进行搭配，并填写到表格的正确行中。 Key patterns: Learn common collocations with verbs 'go', 'play', 'have', and 'do'.
core_patterns: Learn common collocations with verbs 'go', 'play', 'have', and 'do'.

play ping-pong, play sports, play the pipa
do homework, do kung fu, do morning exercises

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and understand the key information in the passage.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个连环画故事。小松鼠zip向小熊zoom讲述了自己一周的忙碌日程，包括周一到周三收集坚果，周四晒坚果，周五和朋友分享坚果。当zoom问起周末的安排时，zip才突然想起自己周六12点有一场琵琶表演，而现在已经快到时间了。 Key patterns: Describing a weekly schedule of activities.; Using frequency adverbs like 'always', 'usually', 'often'.
core_patterns: Describing a weekly schedule of activities.
Using frequency adverbs like 'always', 'usually', 'often'.
Why?
What else?
What do you usually do on the weekend?
When?
allowed_answer_scope: It's Saturday now. Zoom, I'm always very busy.
Let me see. From Monday to Wednesday, I usually collect nuts in the afternoon.
On Thursday, I often dry my nuts in the sun.
On Friday, I eat nuts with my friends.
I often watch TV, but this weekend I have a show. I'll play the pipa.
